role: TERRAS hiring BI & Data Engineer (m/w/d) in Montabaur, Rhineland-Palatinate, Ger

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Datenqualitätssicherung, Dokumentation von Datenflüssen und Aufbau eines DataGovernance-Frameworks
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD combines governance/quality-framework language with fast-moving, hands-on, self-driven delivery language ("Macher", "Eigeninitiative", "treibst sie voran"), landing on mixed.
evidence.domain_risk: Marktintelligenz für die Geschäftsführung und unsere Investoren
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: TERRAS is a construction-industry holding company; dashboards inform management and investor decisions but the JD shows no regulatory/audit/compliance framing, a moderate business-decision context.
evidence.collaboration_width: AI & BI Manager; Tochtergesellschaften; Gemma Analytics; CommaSoft
evidence.data_team_maturity: Gemeinsam mit dem AI & BI Manager bildest du das Kernteam für Daten und Analytics bei TERRAS.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The candidate and the AI & BI Manager together form the entire data/analytics core team, and the first project is described as the company's first data platform build, indicating an early-stage data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Konzeption der ersten TU-Datenanbindung: Finanzdaten und Projektdaten aus den ERPs der Tochtergesellschaften (BRZ, RIB iTwo, BPS, Sage) in Snowflake integrieren
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD names specific subsidiary ERP systems, tech stack (Snowflake, Airflow, Power BI/Loyos), and external partners a hiring manager would know in detail, alongside some generic benefits copy.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Enger Austausch mit Fachabteilungen der 20+ Tochtergesellschaften, um Datenanforderungen und Use Cases zu identifizieren
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves many subsidiary business departments plus management/investors generically rather than one dominant commercial, product, or finance function, so mixed applies.
evidence.autonomy_level: Du steuerst und gestaltest, statt nur zuzuliefern. ... Eigeninitiative und Hands-on-Mentalität: Du erkennst Use Cases selbst, treibst sie voran und setzt sie um
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The candidate is explicitly expected to identify and drive use cases themselves and steer/shape rather than just deliver to spec, a strategic-leaning framing, though day-to-day work remains hands-on pipeline and dashboard delivery, landing on mixed.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Du bist die Brücke zwischen unseren Fachabteilungen und der Datenplattform. Gemeinsam mit dem AI & BI Manager bildest du das Kernteam für Daten und Analytics bei TERRAS.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The candidate is one of the first two members of a brand-new data/analytics core team, building the first data connections and dashboards from the ground up, a greenfield mandate.
evidence.ai_role: Erfahrung im Umgang mit LLMs und AI-Tools im Arbeitsalltag
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI/LLM familiarity is listed only as a nice-to-have, not a core expected skill or infrastructure responsibility.
evidence.testing_framing: Datenqualitätssicherung, Dokumentation von Datenflüssen und Aufbau eines DataGovernance-Frameworks
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate owns building the data quality assurance and governance framework, an explicit responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Datenqualitätssicherung, Dokumentation von Datenflüssen und Aufbau eines DataGovernance-Frameworks
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Data governance and quality assurance are emphasized as operational concerns without compliance/regulatory or stakeholder-trust framing dominating.
